title: Bobymod
description: Adds Boby Related items, biome, and structure
body:
This is an experimental mod that encompasses many new features you can go and look for during your time playing with the mod. More new features will also be added in the future for you to enjoy. 


Main features it adds:

Adds "Boby" Related items, biome, and structure
"Boby" is simply the material name I used for some the mods armors and tools.

Also in the newer updates there is now a gun, a new rage enchantment, and a burger maker to eat burgers.   

here is the mod's discord if you have questions and want to make suggestions for the mod: https://discord.gg/3kwsMVk5jD

Showcase of the mod (Outdated) :https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lc3FsqZjPqQ
